top_signals.title: Stocks Rally as Micron Revives AI Bets, Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks rallied across the world after Micron Technology Inc.’s blowout forecast reaffirmed the bull case for the artificial-intelligence trade. Sentiment drew further support from oil prices returning to prewar levels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US, UK, France, Germany raise alarm about Chinese patrols off eastern Taiwan
top_signals.summary: The countries said Chinese patrols off the coast of Taiwan threaten regional stability and freedom of navigation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Help to Save Reform
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury is seeking views on how the Help to Save scheme can be reformed and simplified.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Extending online marketplace liability to combat non-compliance
top_signals.summary: A proposal to extend current online marketplace VAT liability rules to sales on OMPs by UK based businesses, when their goods are in the UK at the point of sale.

top_signals.title: Customs Modernisation
top_signals.summary: We welcome views on the future of international trade and the impacts of digitalised and modernised practices on the UK customs regime.

top_signals.title: VAT treatment of land for social housing
top_signals.summary: Consultation on introducing a new VAT zero rate for land intended for the construction of social housing across the UK.

top_signals.title: Engines and Elevators Lift German Deals Past $120 Billion
top_signals.summary: Germany’s dealmakers are seeing some of their long-wished-for transactions come to fruition, driving the country to one of its busiest years for mergers and acquisitions in decades.

top_signals.title: How to Build a Better Retirement-Spending Plan Than the 4% Rule - WSJ
top_signals.summary: How to Build a Better Retirement-Spending Plan Than the 4% Rule  WSJ
